basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Gorakhpur Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 17 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Gorakhpur (AIIMS Gorakhpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Gorakhpur (AIIMS Gorakhpur) Junior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Gorakhpur. A total of 17 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Gorakhpur Junior Resident Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 37 years of age who have MBBS from an MCI-recognized institute along with completion of compulsory rotatory internship, internship completion certificate, and valid registration with MCI/State Medical Council are eligible to apply for these Junior Resident vacancies. The walk-in interview for AIIMS Gorakhpur Jun

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 37 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: up to 5 years, OBC: up to 3 years, PwBD (General): up to 10 years, PwBD (OBC): up to 13 years, PwBD (SC/ST): up to 15 years

qualification.details: MBBS from MCI recognized institute. Candidate must have completed compulsory rotatory internship and must produce an internship completion certificate. Valid registration with MCI/State Medical Council.

selection_process: Interview Written examination (if number of candidates is large)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Gorakhpur?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for AIIMS Gorakhpur Non-Academic Junior Resident (Medical) posts is scheduled for 19 May 2026. Candidates should report on this date for registration and the interview.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from an MCI recognized institute and have completed their compulsory rotatory internship. An internship completion certificate and valid registration with MCI/State Medical Council are also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Non-Academic Junior Resident (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 37 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST, OBC, and PwBD candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Non-Academic Junior Resident (Medical) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 17 vacancies announced for the Non-Academic Junior Resident (Medical) position at AIIMS Gorakhpur.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 56100/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 250/- for SC/ST candidates. Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Gorakhpur Junior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an interview. However, a written examination may be conducted if the number of eligible candidates is large.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, Pin Code: 273008.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs. This includes educational certificates, internship completion certificate, registration certificate, and identity proof.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or ad-hoc position?
faq.answer: The recruitment for Non-Academic Junior Resident (Medical) posts is on an ad-hoc basis.
